appSubtitle: Every moment is an opportunity to believe
btnCamera: Look at yourself and say it
btnDonate: Did the app help you? Support us
cameraDialogQuestion: Would you like to open the camera so you can look at yourself and say the affirmation?
cameraDialogNote: No photos saved. Everything stays with you.
cameraError: Cannot access camera. Please allow camera access in your browser settings.
notifBlocked: ✗ Permission blocked – please allow in browser settings
notifNotSupported: Your browser does not support notifications
notifEnabled: Notifications enabled! You'll receive reminders at your set times
personalMax: You can add up to 50 personal affirmations
updateError: Check failed – verify your internet connection
feedbackDesc: Got an idea or suggestion? We'd love to hear it!
toastCopied: Copied! You can paste and share
onboardingSubtitle: The app that helps you believe in yourself every day
onboardingFeature1: Categories – pick the topic that speaks to you: confidence, love, health and more
onboardingFeature2: Favorites – tap the heart to save special affirmations
onboardingFeature3: Camera mode – look at yourself and say it aloud. Double-tap the text to save it to favorites
onboardingFeature4: Personal affirmations – add your own sentences in Settings
onboardingFeature5: Reminders – get inspired three times a day
